headline: Blackstone Weighs Nucleus Network Sale And Potential Portfolio Reallocation
summary: Blackstone is exploring a sale of its clinical trials business Nucleus Network, with major private equity firms expected to participate in the process. The potential auction could also attract interest from global contract research organizations looking to expand their clinical research capabilities. For investors watching NYSE:BX, this move sits against a mixed share price backdrop. Blackstone closed at $110.43, with a 3.4% gain over the past week, alongside declines of 16.9% over 30 days,...
